articles.title: AI is being used to resurrect the voices of dead pilots
articles.description: People used AI on a spectrogram image of cockpit recordings to reconstruct them, forcing the NTSB to temporarily block access to its docket system.
articles.author: Kirsten Korosec

articles.title: SpaceX launches Starship V3 for the first time, but loses booster on return
articles.description: The company had a mostly successful first launch of its upgraded Starship V3, which it needs to power its many ambitious goals in the years to come.
articles.author: Sean O'Kane

articles.title: Blue Origin cleared to fly New Glenn mega-rocket after April mishap
articles.description: Jeff Bezos' rocket company confirmed an engine failure led to the loss of an AST SpaceMobile satellite last month, but offered little detail.
articles.author: Sean O'Kane

articles.title: Google goes for the glitter with disco-ball icons: ‘Are y’all sure you still want this?’
articles.description: You can now disco ball-ify your entire Pixel home screen, says Google.
articles.author: Sarah Perez

articles.title: How VCs and founders use inflated ‘ARR’ to crown AI startups
articles.description: Some AI startups are stretching traditional revenue metrics when talking about progress publicly. And their investors are fully aware.
articles.author: Marina Temkin

articles.title: Kash Patel’s clothing brand website shut down after reports it was hacked
articles.description: According to users on X, the website was hijacked by hackers in an attempt to trick visitors into installing malware.
articles.author: Lorenzo Franceschi-Bicchierai

articles.title: Apple says Epic lawsuit shouldn’t reshape App Store rules for all developers
articles.description: Apple is asking the Supreme Court to narrow the App Store injunction won by Epic Games and overturn the court’s contempt ruling over external payment
articles.author: Sarah Perez

articles.title: Spotify’s AI bet: more of everything, less of what you want
articles.description: Spotify has released a bunch of AI-powered tools that nudge users to create more content. It can be a bit much.
articles.author: Ivan Mehta

articles.title: You can no longer Google the word ‘disregard’
articles.description: After Google Search's AI update, the word "disregard" now effectively breaks the search interface.
articles.author: Russell Brandom

articles.title: We tried Google’s AI glasses and they’re almost there
articles.description: Google demoed prototype Android XR glasses that overlay Gemini-powered translation, navigation, and other information directly into your field of
articles.author: Sarah Perez

articles.title: Trump Mobile confirms it exposed customers’ personal data, including phone numbers and home addresses
articles.description: President Trump’s branded cell phone maker and cell provider said the exposure was linked to a third-party platform and was evaluating whether it
articles.author: Lorenzo Franceschi-Bicchierai

articles.title: SpaceX files to go public, and the math requires a little faith
articles.description: The SpaceX S-1 is finally here, and the story it tells goes way further than rockets. The filing runs to 36 pages of risk factors alone,
articles.author: Theresa Loconsolo

articles.title: Meta quietly launches a new Reddit-like app called Forum
articles.description: The company describes the app as a "dedicated space built for deeper discussions, real answers and communities you care about."
articles.author: Aisha Malik

articles.title: Smart ring maker Oura files to go public
articles.description: The Finnish company said in September that it has sold 5.5 million smart rings to date.
articles.author: Amanda Silberling

articles.title: Audio-generation app Huxe, founded by former NotebookLM developers, shuts down
articles.description: Huxe said that it has pulled its app from App Store and Play Store, and that it will stop working later this month.
articles.author: Ivan Mehta

articles.title: Finnish phone-maker HMD bundles Indian AI chatbot onto new smartphone in push to reach local market
articles.description: HMD is pre-loading Sarvam's Indus chatbot app, which supports 22 Indic languages
articles.author: Ivan Mehta

articles.title: Waymo expands pause to four cities as robotaxis keep driving into floods
articles.description: Waymo's robotaxi service is now suspended in both Atlanta and San Antonio, as the company works to stop its vehicles from driving into flooded roads.
articles.author: Sean O'Kane

articles.title: SpaceX scrubs first Starship V3 launch just before liftoff
articles.description: SpaceX fueled the third-generation rocket booster and ship and was just moments away from liftoff, before calling a scrub. It's expected to try again
articles.author: Sean O'Kane
